# OSIX Tech

> AI consulting firm and software development company based in Santiago de Compostela, Galicia, Spain. We specialize in custom AI-powered development, digital transformation consulting, and managing subsidized innovation grants (IGAPE, IA360, Kit Digital) for businesses across Galicia and Spain.

OSIX Tech is the leading AI consultancy in Galicia (consultoría de IA en Galicia), delivering intelligent agents, AI automations, and custom software to businesses of all sizes. Founded in Santiago de Compostela, we combine deep AI expertise with hands-on digital transformation consulting and public grant management to help Galician and Spanish companies adopt artificial intelligence with real, measurable results.

Key facts:
- Location: Santiago de Compostela, Galicia, Spain
- Languages: English, Spanish, Galician
- Specialization: AI consulting, intelligent agents, process automation, custom software development
- Industries served: logistics, food, industrial, retail, professional services
- Working demo delivered in 2 weeks
- 24/7 ongoing support
- Manages IGAPE, IA360, Ticket Innova, Kit Digital grant applications

## Services

- [Custom AI Development](https://osix.tech/es/servicios/desarrollo-a-medida/): Mobile apps, web platforms, intelligent agents, and AI automations built 100% custom for your business. Working demo in 2 weeks.
- [Digital Transformation Consulting](https://osix.tech/es/servicios/consultoria-transformacion/): On-site visit, operational analysis, and a prioritized action plan with savings estimates delivered in under a week. No commitment required.
- [Subsidized Innovation & Grants](https://osix.tech/es/servicios/innovacion-subvencionada/): We identify public grants (IGAPE, IA360, Ticket Innova, Kit Digital) that fit your company and design the project and technical report to maximize approval. Average 60% grant coverage.

## Case Studies

- [IRIS - AI Email Classification for ICIGA](https://osix.tech/es/#services): AI agents that monitor 6 inboxes in real time, classify 10 types of requests using NLP, and draft automatic responses. Result: 60% time saved in email management.
- [Project Certainty - AI Technical Drawing Solver](https://osix.tech/es/#services): AI-powered proof of concept that solves technical drawing exercises automatically for an educational technology company.

## FAQ

### What does OSIX Tech do?
OSIX Tech is an AI consulting and custom software development company based in Santiago de Compostela, Galicia. We build intelligent agents, AI automations, and custom digital solutions for businesses.

### Where is OSIX Tech located?
Santiago de Compostela, Galicia, Spain. We serve companies across Galicia and all of Spain.

### What AI services does OSIX Tech offer in Galicia?
We offer AI consulting, intelligent agent development, process automation with AI, digital transformation consulting, and subsidized innovation grant management through programs like IGAPE IA360.

### How much does AI consulting cost in Galicia?
Our initial consultation is free. Many AI projects can be partially funded through public grants like IGAPE IA360 (up to 500,000 euros for AI projects in Galician SMEs) or Kit Digital. We also offer a no-cost assessment where we visit your company and deliver a savings report in under a week.

### What grants are available for AI projects in Galicia?
The main grants include IGAPE IA360 (up to 500,000 euros for AI projects in Galician SMEs), KTED, Ticket Innova, and Kit Digital. OSIX Tech manages the full application process and project design.

### How quickly can OSIX Tech deliver an AI solution?
We deliver a working demo in 2 weeks. Full project timelines depend on scope, but our process is designed for speed: 2x faster than industry average.
